mapper.select: SELECT i.*, pan.panel_nm AS panel_nm, lib.widget_nm AS widget_lib_nm, cd_wt.code_label AS widget_type_cd_nm FROM dp_panel_item i LEFT JOIN dp_panel pan ON pan.panel_id = i.panel_id LEFT JOIN dp_widget_lib lib ON lib.widget_lib_id = i.widget_lib_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_wt ON cd_wt.code_grp = 'WIDGET_TYPE' AND cd_wt.code_value = i.widget_type_cd WHERE i.panel_item_id = #{id}
